subject: WM-0182 ready for review
body: Addressed Mirror changes_requested: readActiveClaimsInto now emits amounts only for ITEM_QUANTITY/CAPACITY with exact [0,0,2,0,3] regression; formal TypeChecker root traversal now enforces receiver identity and rejects foreign, non-this, and unresolved receivers through the same auditor. 46 focused tests, 15 Worker tests, all gates, and 524-test quality pass.
